e.g. /dev/ttyUSB0 or /dev/ttyAMA0. Must: e.g. /dev/ttyUSB0 or /dev/ttyAMA0. Must be readable by the ioBroker process.
Panasonic Aquarea always uses 9600 8E1. Do not change unless you have a custom transceiver.
How often to query the heat pump. Heisha: How often to query the heat pump. HeishaMon defaults to 5 seconds.
Poll the extra data block (K/L series on: Poll the extra data block (K/L series only)
Adds 6 additional 16-bit energy datapoin: Adds 6 additional 16-bit energy datapoints. Harmless on older models.
Send optional-PCB poll frames (not yet i: Send optional-PCB poll frames (not yet implemented)
Reserved for future SG-Ready / external: Reserved for future SG-Ready / external thermostat support.
Do not send any polls or set commands. D: Do not send any polls or set commands. Decode and store frames sent by another master on the bus (e.g. HeishaMon during Phase-4 parallel operation).
